name: Hot Red Dragon Archfiend Abyss
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>琰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> レッド・デーモン・アビス
name_jp_tl: Jeweled Demon Dragon Red Daemon Abyss
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 non-Tuner DARK Dragon Synchro Monster
(Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can target 1 Tuner in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Hot Red Dragon Archfiend Abyss" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Pulse of the King

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Synchro Monsters only as non-Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Attribute specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Type specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
